description: Personal behavioral interview questions with your own response hints and feedback notes.

personalSection.title: My Personal Behavioral Questions
personalSection.description: React Native / Frontend Developer — behavioral interview practice with personal response hints.

questions.question: Tell me about a time you fixed a production bug affecting users.
questions.response_hints: WhatsApp OTP attack, bill spiked, fixed with CAPTCHA + rate limiting.
questions.feedback: Tighten the ending with a crisp lesson statement.

questions.question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a manager.
questions.response_hints: Dashboard in 2 days; negotiated scope, shipped essentials only.
questions.feedback: Emphasize WHY you pushed back — business impact.

questions.question: Tell me about a time you learned something new at work.
questions.response_hints: Built shared UI library; learned TurboRepo and package publishing.
questions.feedback: Lead with the learning part, not the solution.

questions.question: Tell me about a mistake you made at work.
questions.response_hints: Test credentials leaked; locked testers out; gave access to DevOps only.
questions.feedback: Explain WHY DevOps — security best practice framing.

questions.question: Tell me about a conflict with a teammate.
questions.response_hints: Backend dev refused roles API; explained maintenance burden; he agreed.

questions.question: Tell me about a time you learned from a failure.
questions.response_hints: Missing trailing slash hurt SEO; learned to get PRs reviewed.
questions.feedback: Wrap up with a tighter closing lesson.

questions.question: Tell me about communicating technical info to non-technical people.
questions.response_hints: Explains in benefits and cost terms, not technical internals.
questions.feedback: Add a concrete example where PM made a faster decision.

questions.question: Tell me about a project you weren't excited about.
questions.response_hints: Repetitive app setup; turned boredom into improving login flow.
questions.feedback: Lean into the improvement initiative angle.

questions.question: Tell me about working with limited resources.
questions.response_hints: Unblocks devs first, then production, then own coding.
questions.feedback: State priority order in one clean decisive sentence.

questions.question: Tell me about an achievement you're proud of.
questions.response_hints: React Native upgrade improved performance by ~70%.
questions.feedback: Go deep on one — versions, specific wins, business impact.

questions.question: Describe your ideal work environment.
questions.response_hints: Collaborative, learning-focused, hybrid, quiet workspace, ~8 hours.
questions.feedback: Add WHY each preference impacts your performance.

questions.question: Tell me about adapting to a significant change.
questions.response_hints: Learned Tailwind from scratch; recognized pattern after few days.
questions.feedback: Show your learning process — needs more depth.

questions.question: Tell me about prioritizing quality vs speed.
questions.response_hints: Quality first; cut scope on tight deadlines, ship rest later.
questions.feedback: Anchor with the 2-day investor dashboard example.

questions.question: Tell me about receiving critical feedback.
questions.response_hints: Wrong interface placement in PR; learned codebase conventions.
questions.feedback: Emphasize what changed in your behaviour after.

questions.question: Tell me about mentoring a junior developer.
questions.response_hints: Teaches devs to debug independently; shows tools on calls.
questions.feedback: Add a concrete outcome — a mentee's specific improvement.

questions.question: Tell me about dealing with unclear requirements.
questions.response_hints: Creates wireframe and design prototype before coding starts.
questions.feedback: Explain WHY — ambiguity wastes dev time.
